programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: Rush - Time Machine: Live in Cleveland
programme.desc: Celebrating 30 years since the 1981 release of their classic bestselling album 'Moving Pictures,' the band performed the entire album live for the first time as the centerpiece of the concerts.

programme.title: Willie Nelson - Live at iTunes Festival
programme.desc: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007.

programme.title: The Everly Brothers Reunion Concert
programme.desc: The 1983 London reunion features "Bye, Bye Love," "Wake Up Little Suzie," "Bird Dog" and "Cathy's Clown."

programme.title: Qello Concerts
programme.desc: Earlier this year Lynyrd Skynyrd performed their first two studio albums, Pronounced 'Lĕh-'nérd 'Skin-'nérd and Second Helping, live in their entirety for the first time, at two specially staged concerts at the Florida Theatre in their home town of J...

programme.title: Paul Simon - Live in New York City
programme.desc: During the first leg of Paul Simon's triumphant, 2011 U.S. tour, he thrilled hometown fans with a special club performance at New York City's historic Webster Hall.

programme.title: Muse: Live at Festival Rock Am Ring
programme.desc: Rock Am Ring in Nürburgring and Rock Im Park in Nuremberg are music festivals that take place annually at the Nürburgring Race Track in Western Germany, featuring Muse.

programme.title: Guns N' Roses - Live From The O2 Arena London
programme.desc: Watch this production of Guns N' Roses performing live at the O2 Arena featuring hits: Paradise City, Sweet Child O' Mine, November Rain and many more.

programme.title: Foo Fighters - Austin City Limits
programme.desc: The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas. The festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.title: Imagine Dragons - Live At The Moody Theater
programme.desc: Filmed at The Moody Theater, Texas, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Classic Imagine Dragons featuring unforgettable version of their hits: 'Demons', 'Radioactive' and many more.

programme.desc: Stingray DJAZZ is a deep dive into jazz without boundaries, offering a selection of concerts, major festival performances, rare documentaries, intimate portraits, and behind-the-scenes footage of artists from around the world.

programme.title: Music Talks: Queen Latifah
programme.desc: Music industry titan Andre Harrell sits down with the legendary Queen Latifah for an inside look at her journey through the avenues of the entertainment industry.

programme.title: Nas: Time is Illmatic (Giant)
programme.desc: The story behind Nas's groundbreaking debut album 'Illmatic,' and the early life of one of the most talented rappers of all time. Featuring Pharrell Williams, Alicia Keys, Q-Tip, and Busta Rhymes.

programme.title: Nicki Minaj: Pink Planet
programme.desc: American rapper, singer, songwriter and entertainer Nicki Minaj was born in St James, Trinidad and raised in Jamaica. Between 2007 and 2009, she released 3 mixtapes and due to the success she was signed to Young Money Entertainment. Her debut solo al...

programme.title: Something from Nothing: The Art of Rap
programme.desc: Ice-T travels coast to coast interviewing rap performers such as Q-Tip, Common and Kanye West to pay tribute to the musical art form.

programme.title: The Legendary Barry White
programme.desc: Recorded live in Belgium, Barry White was a regular in the Top Twenty in the 1970s with hit after hit featuring lush strings over his amazing bass voice.

programme.title: Tupac Shakur: Before I Wake
programme.desc: A look back on Tupac's final years through the eyes of Rap legends "Eazy-E", Russell Simmons and Tupac's personal bodyguard, Frank Alexander. Featuring never-before-seen footage.

programme.title: Bob Marley: Roots of the Man
programme.desc: Robert Nesta Marley, known across the globe as Bob Marley, was the first and debatably only superstar ever to emerge from the third world.

programme.title: Paul McCartney: Wings of a Beatle
programme.desc: From the small clubs of Liverpool to the world stage, Sir Paul McCartney has dedicated his life to the music industry. Experience the story behind one of the music industries most treasure musical icons. This is Sir Paul McCartney.

programme.title: Mighty Good: The Beatles
programme.desc: No musical group has had as profound an impact on pop music as The Beatles. Tony Palmer’s groundbreaking documentary gives us an intimate look at one of the most influential groups in musical history.

programme.title: The Beatles - Made on Merseyside
programme.desc: The Beatles defined music and popular culture like no other band ever will - but was their journey from Merseyside teenagers to international pop stars one of luck or inevitability?

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints a still lake that captures the reflection of some trees as a range of rugged mountains stand guard in the background.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: The soothing sounds of a cascading waterfall come to mind in this charming Bob Ross landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Powerful mountains softened with grassy meadows and little evergreens framing a nice shiny mere - this is a lovely Bob Ross masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Today Bob Ross paints a warm and elegant snow-kissed scene with a little cabin snuggled deeply into the embrace of foothills, evergreens and bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Stroll down to the river and cast your line with Bob Ross from the bridge - join in the fun and paint this masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Drive through mountain country with Bob Ross and happen upon a ridge of thick, rich evergreens gracing the hollow below.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross uses monochromatic tones to convey the icy coldness of a silvery lake surrounded by lacy trees and bushes - brr!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy this Bob Ross scene that includes luxurious green foliage and an old weathered trestle-bridge placed lovingly amongst all the beauty.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Sneak away into the cold shadows with Bob Ross and enjoy the beauty of a winter night at the foot of a large fierce waterfall.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes us to an isolated cabin deep in the woods on a cold, snowy winter day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross travels with his paintbrushes into the density of an evening grove and discovers the beauty of a gentle, hushed rippling river.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes a detour from the trail and discovers a rarely used trail through country woods.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes you to a lovely spot deep in the woods where the seclusion, silence, and beauty offer serenity to the soul.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Even a tiny shanty by the pond can be a warm place in the dead of winter - Bob Ross shows us how to make a snow scene glow!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In the still of the night, trees reflect off the glistening pond and cool breeze of blows as Bob Ross takes you on this black canvas adventure.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross on a clear windless day, where reflections are so smooth they appear to be crystal likenesses of the mountains above.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Warm skies, pleasant valley and purple misty mountains - the perfect place to pitch your tent and enjoy the view with painter Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A real Bob Ross favorite - he uses blue and red highlights to accentuate the drama and beauty of a snow-bound cabin at sunset.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Come along with Bob Ross as he creates a winter moon hanging over a snow covered farm nestled among the trees - all on black canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: An interesting way to frame two pictures! Bob Ross paints a mountain landscape from luscious summer to beautiful winter, both on one canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In this dark breathtaking scene, Bob Ross creates an almost calm night with waves crashing against rocks and a protective lighthouse.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A playful brook appears the perfect complement to a range of rugged mountains in this Bob Ross setting on canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A beautiful fall scene -- Bob Ross uses the colors of nature to settle an old worn-down farm building into soft golden grassy bushes and trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The undaunted splendor of sky, trees, and lake has never been more beautifully portrayed than in this joyful Bob Ross creation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a drive into the country with Bob Ross and pass through an old covered bridge into a landscape bursting with soft fall foliage.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join television artist Bob Ross and take a peek through the fog of a snowy morning as the awakening sun enters into a new day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a walk with Bob Ross down a little lakeside path in a secluded place; you'll delight in the discovery of a small uninhabited island.

programme.desc: Einar Gilkyson (Robert Redford) lives on a Wyoming ranch with his only friend, Mitch (Morgan Freeman). Then, suddenly, the woman he blames for his son's death arrives at his door broke, desperate, and with a granddaughter he's never known.

programme.desc: A wealthy businessman searching for his missing brother is drawn into a dark underworld that threatens his sanity and his family.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects brought in include a ship's anchor, a medal given for heroism to a local sailor who helped break Captain Scott's ship out of Antarctic ice in 1901, and a rare example of early flat pack furniture dating back to the 17th century.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts meet visitors bringing family heirlooms to the 18th century cotton mill of New Lanark; treasures featured include a pearl necklace bought cheaply at a boot sale, and a valuable clock found in a flea market.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Tunnels of Terror
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Lockport, New York to investigate an underworld of tunnels. It holds a mystery of possible murder, multiple deaths and frightening phenomena. What stories do the spirits of Lockport Caves want to tell?

programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Gloucester, Massachusetts to investigate Hammond Castle.

programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Sylvan Beach, New York where the new owner of a historic amusement park finds himself in the middle of a mystery.
